"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:P"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "### Summary The TrailingSlashMiddleware in internal/api/server.go is vulnerable to an open redirect attack. An attacker can craft a URL with a protocol-relative path (e.g., //evil.com/) that, after trailing slash removal, results in a Location header of //evil.com — which browsers interpret as an absolute URL to an external domain. ### Details The TrailingSlashMiddleware strips trailing slashes from request paths and issues a 308 Permanent Redirect to the cleaned path. However, it does not validate or sanitize the resulting path before using it as the redirect target. When a request is made with a path like //evil.com/, the middleware processes it as follows: ### PoC 1. Start the registry server locally or identify a deployed instance 2. Send a request with a double-slash path followed by an external domain: `curl -v https:////evil.com/` 3. Observe the 308 Permanent Redirect response with Location: //evil.com: 4. When accessed in a browser, the user is redirected to https://evil.com ### Impact **Phishing**: Attackers can abuse the trusted registry domain to redirect users to credential-harvesting pages **Malware distribution**: Redirect users to sites serving malicious downloads **Trust abuse:** Links originating from the official MCP Registry domain carry implicit trust", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00409, "percentile": 0.32542}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v8vw-gw5j-w7m6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T17:02:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8vw-gw5j-w7m6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v8vw-gw5j-w7m6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44427"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-14T22:16:44Z", "published_at": "2026-05-08T17:02:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry/security/advisories/GHSA-v8vw-gw5j-w7m6", "https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry/pull/1227", "https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry/commit/1201cbd82b2cf6d4b56edfc05c763059a12f9fdb", "https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry/releases/tag/v1.7.5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44427", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8vw-gw5j-w7m6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/modelcontextprotocol/registry/security-advisories/GHSA-v8vw-gw5j-w7m6", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry", "summary": "MCP Registry has open redirect via protocol-relative path in trailing-slash middleware", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-15T23:47:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v8vw-gw5j-w7m6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.7.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.1.0, < 1.7.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
